data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes the time required for a user to make a decision by reducing choices.
data.technical_spec: Prioritization of primary actions by reducing menu options.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Predicts the time required to reach a target, focusing on button placement and size.
data.technical_spec: Adapts UI elements for ease of access, especially on touch devices.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items together to improve comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Consistent spacing and modular design patterns.

data.title: Law of Similarity
data.description: Ensures similar elements are perceived as related.
data.technical_spec: Consistent design language and iconography across the site.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Aligns with user expectations set by common internet experiences.
data.technical_spec: Adherence to universally recognized UI components and navigational flow.
